name: Agarose Gel Electrophoresis
description: Agarose gel electrophoresis: DNA fragments loaded alongside a size ladder migrate through an agarose matrix toward the anode and separate by size, are stained and visualised under UV, and re-run at adjusted conditions if bands are not resolved.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["DNA samples"]
    N2["DNA size ladder"]
    N3["Agarose + TAE buffer"]
    N4["Cast gel with comb"]
    N5["Load samples + ladder"]
    N6["Apply voltage; migrate"]
    N7{"Dye front near gel end?"}
    N8["Stain; visualize on UV"]
    N9{"Bands resolved at size?"}
    N10["Sized DNA fragments imaged"]

    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N1 --> N5
    N2 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 -->|no| N6
    N7 -->|yes| N8
    N8 --> N9
    N9 -->|adjust %| N4
    N9 -->|yes| N10

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

nodeDetails.label: DNA samples
nodeDetails.detail: Fragments to be sized, in loading dye

nodeDetails.label: DNA size ladder
nodeDetails.detail: Reference ladder of known fragment sizes

nodeDetails.label: Agarose + TAE buffer
nodeDetails.detail: Agarose dissolved in TAE/TBE running buffer

nodeDetails.label: Cast gel with comb
nodeDetails.detail: Pour molten agarose, set with comb to form wells

nodeDetails.label: Load samples + ladder
nodeDetails.detail: Load DNA and ladder into wells

nodeDetails.label: Apply voltage; migrate
nodeDetails.detail: DNA migrates toward the anode; smaller fragments move faster

nodeDetails.label: Dye front near gel end?
nodeDetails.detail: Has the tracking dye migrated far enough?

nodeDetails.label: Stain; visualize on UV
nodeDetails.detail: Stain with intercalating dye; image under UV

nodeDetails.label: Bands resolved at size?
nodeDetails.detail: Are fragments resolved at expected sizes vs ladder?

nodeDetails.label: Sized DNA fragments imaged
nodeDetails.detail: Gel image with fragments sized against the ladder
